testcase.name: test_get_semesters
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_semester_portal_email.py:58: in test_get_semesters assert len(data) >= 2 E AssertionError: assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = len([{'created_at': '2026-02-12T22:39:46.329848+00:00', 'end_date': '2024-12-20', 'is_active': False, 'name': 'Semester 1', ...}])

testcase.name: test_get_active_semester

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False == True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaf1faed55c0>('is_active') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaf1faed55c0> = {'created_at': '2026-02-12T22:39:46.329848+00:00', 'end_date': '2024-12-20', 'is_active': False, 'name': 'Semester 1', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_semester_portal_email.py:76: in test_get_active_semester assert data.get("is_active") == True E AssertionError: assert False == True E + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaf1faed55c0>('is_active') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaf1faed55c0> = {'created_at': '2026-02-12T22:39:46.329848+00:00', 'end_date': '2024-12-20', 'is_active': False, 'name': 'Semester 1', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_portal_email_endpoint_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Portal email endpoint should exist: 520 assert 520 in [200, 500] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_semester_portal_email.py:289: in test_portal_email_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [200, 500], f"Portal email endpoint should exist: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Portal email endpoint should exist: 520 E assert 520 in [200, 500] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_portal_email_with_different_expiration_days

failure.message: AssertionError: Should accept 7 days expiration assert 520 in [200, 500] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_semester_portal_email.py:304: in test_portal_email_with_different_expiration_days assert response.status_code in [200, 500], f"Should accept {days} days expiration" E AssertionError: Should accept 7 days expiration E assert 520 in [200, 500] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_portal_token_expiration_validation

failure.message: AssertionError: Token should expire in ~7 days, got 29 assert 29 <= 8

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_semester_portal_email.py:324: in test_portal_token_expiration_validation assert 6 <= days_until_expiry <= 8, f"Token should expire in ~7 days, got {days_until_expiry}" E AssertionError: Token should expire in ~7 days, got 29 E assert 29 <= 8
